revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-1-160

Spectral concentration (of a radiometric quantity radiant flux, radiant intensity, etc.)

Quotient of the quantity, taken over an infinitesimal range on either side of a given wavelength, by the range.



Reference: C.I.E. (extract)
